'''Lido Mufrenes''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who attempted to kill [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] in order to win a bet on how long the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] would survive on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. He was killed by [[Vilmarh Grahrk]], who also wanted to kill Vos to win the bet.<ref name="Twilight 1" />
